name: slack
title: Slack
description: Quick launcher for Slack conversations directly from Raycast
author: Gabriel Rosas

commands.name: tags
commands.title: Slack Conversation Tags
commands.description: Create and manage tags for Slack conversations

commands.name: sync
commands.title: Slack Sync
commands.description: Sync conversations and users from Slack

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
